tool.name: Data Assembler
tool.description: Assembles data from reflectivity, parquet files, and analyzer model into a single AI-ready output.

param.name: config_json
param.label: JSON Configuration
param.help: A JSON file with assembler options.

configfiles.configfile:
import json, sys with open(sys.argv[1]) as f: d = json.load(f) _, _, default_output_dir, default_reflectivity, default_model = (sys.argv + [''] * 5)[:5] default_output_dir = default_output_dir or 'output' with open('_env.sh', 'w') as f: f.write('export OUTPUT_DIR="%s/assembled"
' % d.get('output_directory', default_output_dir)) f.write('export CFG_REFLECTIVITY="%s"
' % (d.get('result_file') or default_reflectivity)) f.write('export CFG_FINAL_MODEL="%s"
' % (d.get('final_model') or default_model)) # If model_available is missing, fall back to whether a model path is available. model_available = d.get('model_available', bool(d.get('final_model') or default_model)) f.write('export CFG_MODEL_AVAILABLE="%s"
' % ('1' if model_available else '0'))

tool.command: #if $config_json python '$parse_config_script' '$config_json' 'output' '$reflectivity' '$model' && . _env.sh && #else export OUTPUT_DIR='output/assembled' && export CFG_REFLECTIVITY='$reflectivity' && export CFG_FINAL_MODEL='$model' && export CFG_MODEL_AVAILABLE='1' && #end if REFLECTIVITY_INPUT="\$CFG_REFLECTIVITY" && if [ -z "\$REFLECTIVITY_INPUT" ] || [ ! -f "\$REFLECTIVITY_INPUT" ]; then echo "Falling back to reflectivity tool input." | tee -a $output; REFLECTIVITY_INPUT='$reflectivity'; else echo "Using reflectivity: \$REFLECTIVITY_INPUT" | tee -a $output; fi && MODEL_INPUT="\$CFG_FINAL_MODEL" && USE_MODEL=1 && if [ "\$CFG_MODEL_AVAILABLE" != "1" ]; then echo "model_available=false; skipping -m option to data-assembler ingest." | tee -a $output; USE_MODEL=0; else if [ -z "\$MODEL_INPUT" ] || [ ! -f "\$MODEL_INPUT" ]; then echo "Falling back to model tool input." | tee -a $output; MODEL_INPUT='$model'; else echo "Using model: \$MODEL_INPUT" | tee -a $output; fi; fi && mkdir -p \$OUTPUT_DIR && mkdir parquet && tar -xzvf $parquet -C parquet && if [ "\$USE_MODEL" = "1" ]; then data-assembler ingest -r "\$REFLECTIVITY_INPUT" -p parquet -m "\$MODEL_INPUT" -o output > >(tee -a $output) 2> >(tee -a $output >&2); else data-assembler ingest -r "\$REFLECTIVITY_INPUT" -p parquet -o output > >(tee -a $output) 2> >(tee -a $output >&2); fi && tar -czvf $out_gz -C output .
